projectDescription: Customizable TUI Pomodoro timer with ASCII art, progress bar, desktop notifications, and productivity statistics.
keyFeatures: Work and break timer sessions with Pomodoro cycles
Task chaining with user confirmation prompts
Keyboard shortcuts to adjust time mid-session
Clean, minimal TUI with customizable ASCII art timer fonts
Productivity statistics with duration ratios and heatmaps
Weekly bar chart and 4-month GitHub-style activity visualization
publicApiSurface: pomo [work duration] [break duration] - Start a work session
pomo break [duration] - Start a break session
ASCII fonts: mono12, rebel, ansi, ansiShadow
Notification settings: enabled, urgent, title, message, icon
Session end actions: ask, start, quit
